entity.summary: International centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2013, providing retail trading and wallet services across multiple regional markets.
entity.notes: Official company history supports the 2013 founding year. HEI retains the existing United Kingdom historical origin while current independent profiles may describe another registration jurisdiction.

expected.summary: United Kingdom-based centralized exchange launched in 2013 and still operating under the Luno brand.

changes.summary: International centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2013, providing retail trading and wallet services across multiple regional markets.
changes.notes: Official company history supports the 2013 founding year. HEI retains the existing United Kingdom historical origin while current independent profiles may describe another registration jurisdiction.

events.title: Luno was founded
events.description: Luno was founded in 2013 and developed consumer cryptocurrency products for international markets.
events.notes: Year-level launch marker based on official company history.

events.title: Luno Malaysia was registered as a digital asset exchange operator
events.description: The Securities Commission Malaysia registered Luno Malaysia Sdn Bhd as a Recognized Market Operator to establish and operate a digital asset exchange in Malaysia.
events.notes: The registration was jurisdiction-specific and supported Luno's continued operation in Malaysia.

evidence.title: Luno's vision for a better financial future for everyone
evidence.notes: Official company article states that Luno was founded in 2013.

evidence.title: About Luno
evidence.notes: Current official company page describes Luno's continuing service history since 2013.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Luno
evidence.notes: Independent profile corroborates the Luno exchange identity and 2013 establishment year.

evidence.title: SC Registers Three Digital Asset Exchanges
evidence.notes: Primary regulator announcement names Luno Malaysia as one of three registered Recognized Market Operators for digital asset exchanges.

evidence.title: Digital Asset Exchange Operators
evidence.notes: The regulator's current digital-assets directory continues to list Luno Malaysia as a registered DAX operator.
